programme.desc: A young man makes a big mistake about what he believes to be his birthday gift.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When an older man gives Vicki attention, she thinks it's a sign of potential romance, but his advances aren't actually a sign of affection. Meanwhile, a bi-coastal couple learns that their relationship only works long distance.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A producer of TV commercials casts Judy in a singing spot without first checking out the quality of her voice.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Ace has mixed feelings when a girlfriend from the past returns in a wheelchair.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An aggressive woman causes confusion when she's sets her sights on the chaperone of a musical group. At the same time, a young woman changes her appearance to get the attention of the man who wouldn't hire her.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A stiff British ex-military officer is put in charge of the fun-loving and energy-filled Menudo group; a young couple is confouded because Doc seems very much in love with his visiting ex-wife, a fact Doc attributes to the fact that he is divorced.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A hurricane devastates the tropical island where a shore party of Capt. Stubing, his crew members, and passengers are held captive by a strange hermit while the Pacific Princess totters under the command of a bumbling deputy captain.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In Part 2, the captain and crew are still marooned.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Julie's parents arrive on board the Pacific Princess and announce their plans to divorce.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A man makes a move on three women; not knowing that they are traveling companions.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Captain Stubing's Uncle Cyrus uses every trick in his devious mind to get Julie alone, until her "Aunt Phoebe" intervenes; a desperate businessman uses his daughter as bait to close a deal.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A shy young man becomes a completely different person at night; a businessman who doesn't have time for his family learns a valuable lesson.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A magician keeps his engagement secret in order to dazzle female audiences, while his neglected fiancee turns to Captain Stubing for comfort.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In "Accidental Cruise," the executive and his secretary come aboard a bit tipsy, are mistaken for another couple, and assigned the honeymoon suite.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Three hairs… microscopic fibers… a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear – kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which as mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.desc: The group has a difficult time molding to a new lifestyle, forcing them to consider whether they can be the people they once were.

programme.desc: As Rick and the others continue to acclimate to their new surroundings, they consider a return to normalcy.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: While trying to secure a new home, Rick and his group face challenges, and question the utopia they find themselves in.

programme.desc: When it appears that things are starting to normalize in the settlement, a new problem arises for the Alexandrians.

programme.desc: Morgan recalls his travels from King County to Alexandria, where he encountered a solo survivor who taught him a new code to live by.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The sheltered citizens inside the walls of Alexandria must face a grim reality that might be too much for them to handle; Deanna doubts her leadership.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Abraham and Sasha encounter many obstacles and a new threat while trying to return to Alexandria.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Alexandria is finally able to begin pulling itself back together; peace is embraced between the two groups.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras se dirigen hacia el norte, el grupo se ve obligado a detenerse porque una horda de zombis bloquea el camino. La tensión aumenta y la situación termina por estallar cuando Eugene confiesa un secreto que había ocultado a todos hasta ahora.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Daryl persiguen a los captores de Beth por una Atlanta devastada, pero su auto se queda sin gasolina y deben pasar la noche en un refugio para mujeres.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Noah regresan a la iglesia para pedirles ayuda a sus compañeros. Rick y otros integrantes del grupo van a Atlanta con la intención de secuestrar a varios policías para intercambiarlos por Beth y Carol.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick busca una salida pacífica al conflicto, pero sus enemigos la rechazan y prefieren zanjar las cosas de forma violenta.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Para cumplir con la promesa que Beth le hizo Noah antes de morir, el grupo se dirige al barrio de Noah, esperando hallar allí protección y a otros supervivientes. Sin embargo, Rick y los suyos no quieren hacerse demasiadas esperanzas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El vehículo se avería y el grupo continúa a pie hacia Washington D. C., pero les sorprende una tormenta y buscan cobijo en un granero, donde encuentran algo totalmente inesperado e inquietante.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aaron invita al grupo a Alexandria, su comunidad, un lugar que, según él, es seguro y amigable. Rick, incapaz de olvidar Woodbury y Terminus, desconfía de Aaron, pero Michonne quiere darle una oportunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los integrantes del grupo tienen entrevistas con Deanna, la jefa de Alexandria, y esperan en las casas que les asignan a saber si son aceptados o rechazados. Cuando conocen a los habitantes de la comunidad, perciben que no están bien entrenados.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick, Daryl y Carol se reúnen en secreto para planear cómo recuperar sus armas del arsenal de Alexandria, ya que temen que, si algo sale mal, van a necesitarlas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol le sugiere a Rick que deben asesinar a Pete porque es violento con su esposa e hijo. Por otra parte, Gabriel advierte a Deanna que desconfíe del grupo de Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Deanna y Rick se culpan mutuamente de las muertes de Aidenn y Noah. Rick le ofrece a Jessie protección ante Pete, pero este lo descubre y se enzarza en una pelea con él. La tensión en Alexandria aumenta y algo terrible se avecina.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Deanna quiere expulsar al grupo de Rick de Alexandria y ellos se preparan para defenderse. Sin embargo, la llegada de una banda de asaltantes y la irrupción de una horda de zombis interrumpen el enfrentamiento entre los dos bandos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y Morgan encuentran una horda descomunal de zombis en una cantera cercana a Alexandria. Entretanto, Carter convoca a varios habitantes de Alexandria para proponerles un plan: matar a Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Lobos, el grupo con el que ya habían combatido, asalta Alexandria y empieza a acuchillar a sus ciudadanos por las calles. Durante la pelea, Enid huye de Alexandria y Ron rechaza la ayuda de Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo trata de reconducir a la horda de zombis para alejarla de Alexandria, pero el plan falla y Glenn y Nicholas terminan rodeados por muertos vivientes. Rick, por su parte, es atacado por los asaltantes que Morgan expulsó de Alexandria.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Ceiling mounted speakers disappear in plaster. The new HVAC system gets turned on. New garage doors are side mounted. The pool is lowered into place. The homeowner makes kitchen design choices.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Inside, the team is busy with floor installation, and the design plans for the master bath are finalized. Outside, a custom pizza oven and fireplace arrive, as well the plants and the new pool cover.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom assists with interior window trim and custom storm windows. Richard checks out an electric meter and panels. Mark follows work on the hardscape. Kevin watches the assembly of a decorative shed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Trees and sod are transplanted with Jenn, while a custom deck hatch is installed to access the basement. Inside, Kevin and Jeff assemble a smart lock system and Tom helps mount a unique range hood.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Work happens in the kitchen. Kevin and Tom tackle the molding. The pantry gets a secret door. Countertops, backsplash and tile are installed. A new wood mantle goes around the gas fireplace.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The abandoned Seaside Victorian Cottage is restored to its original beauty. A new addition matches the existing architectural details. New hardscape and landscape anchor it to the corner lot.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The show returns to Dorchester, MA, the home of the first This Old House project, to follow the renovation of a triple decker that burned from illegal fireworks.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Asbestos is removed from exposed ductwork. Richard meets the new plumber. Jenn visits a community garden. A local historian speaks about triple deckers. Tom and Charlie pull off the melted siding.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The back porches are brought to code. Ice blasting is used to get rid of the fire odor. New vinyl siding gets installed. Homeowner Carol considers new accent colors to match. Framing begins inside.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Jenn creates a patio building team. Heath rewires a section with intact plaster. Charlie and Tom hang a fire rated door. Richard explains how a tub fits in. Kevin and Tom install a replacement window.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom works with new apprentices. Kevin meets them and learns about YouthBuild. Homeowner Carol looks at kitchen cabinets and counters. Richard works with James on separate HVAC systems.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Mauro works with the apprentices to fix plaster damage. Richard meets plumber Ronnette about the new sprinkler system. Carol and her sister shop for tile. The glass doors get repaired by an expert.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin reinstall cabinets that survived the fire. Tom teaches apprentices to trim a window. HVAC contractor James shows Richard the plan for hot water. Carol and her sister shop for appliances.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The apprentices attend a roofing class and then put their skills to practice. Back at the triple decker, a vinyl floor goes in. Mauro touches up the cabinets. Tom and Charlie install French doors.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Well over a year and a half since the fire, the triple decker is just about ready for the homeowners to return. Kevin O'Connor checks out what's left to do in all three units, both inside and out.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Illegal fireworks caused a fire in the Dorchester triple decker. Charlie Silva along with local contractors put this house back together. After a long wait, Carol and family can now move back home.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Follow the renovation of an 1887 dark, divided two-family home to a bright, open Scandinavian-style one-family, all in a one-episode summer special.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The number of people entering the building trades is declining. This Old House launched the Generation Next initiative to encourage young people to consider the trades as a viable profession.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin, Richard, and Tom follow a family on their journey to restore an abandoned house in Detroit. The city has a program to bring these empty houses back to life, revitalizing the neighborhoods.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: On November 8, 2018 the residents of Paradise woke to a wildfire that would burn many homes and take lives. This Old House follows three families on their emotional ride as they rebuild their homes.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: This 1880 Country Cape started as a small house on a large piece of land but was added onto over time. The crew meets the homeowners and tours both inside and outside to learn about the plans.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Appliances and radiators are salvaged before the major demolition begins. Outside, an arborist sprays the Hemlock trees to protect from damaging insects. Time to cut off the garage addition.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The old foundation gets modified for the new basement. Jenn meets with the landscape designer to discuss the plans for the front yard. On the first floor, Charlie and Tom install a recessed beam.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The foundation is waterproofed. Exterior paint colors are discussed. Homeowner Megan lends a hand turning the new newel posts. Cape style homes are discussed. The foundation is braced for backfilling.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The old foundation is transitioned to the new. Natural stone is cut into veneers. A new beam is installed on the back dormer for more headroom. Homeowner Megan and her interior designer look at tile.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A Flitch beam is installed. Tree maintenance is performed. A new footing is poured under the kitchen chimney. Sheathing systems are explored. Kevin tours a high-tech sheathing factory in Georgia.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A block wall is constructed to accept the addition framing. The old floor joists are shimmed to make a smooth transition to the new part of the house. The kitchen designer lays out the kitchen.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Cheryl asks Jack to father her child, but Jack refuses. Janet thinks Cheryl wants to marry Jack because she's going to have his baby, so she talks Jack into complying with Cheryl's wishes. Guest Star(s): Joanna Kerns

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry discovers an answered magazine quiz and he and Jack think one of the girls wants to have an affair with Jack. They take the girls on a weekend trip to find out who answered the quiz so Jack can talk her out of it.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack receives $1,000 by mistake from an automated cash machine. He hides it in the couch for the weekend but when the Bank Security arrives to collect the money, it is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack writes a nasty letter to a famous food critic, thinking the critic is going to give his bistro a ruinous review. When the critic assures Jack the review will be favorable, Jack tries to retrieve the letter from the critic's desk.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is dating a sex therapist who has asked him to keep her job a secret. Janet, concluding she is a prostitute, is nasty to her and no one can understand why - especially when Janet's own father has become so friendly with her.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has two dates, so he talks Larry into posing as him and spending the day with his unwanted date, Janet's childhood friend, who is visiting from out of town.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack believes he has won a baking contest that is open only to women. Disguised as "Grandma Tripper," he goes to collect the check and learns that he is a finalist and must bake his cookies for the company's executives to win the prize.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's father visits unexpectedly and resumes his good nature meddling. Jack explodes and tells him to stay out of his life, but when he learns his father has lost his job, Jack gives him the opportunity to be useful.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri is up for a promotion and tells Dr. Kenderson she is married to ward off his advances. When he invites himself and his wife over for dinner, Jack poses as Terri's husband while Janet and Larry pose as French-speaking house guests.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Jack attends a charity ball with a socialite and loses $15,000 gambling, Larry and the girls attempt to help him recover the money.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls flip over a handsome Englishman who moves in next door, but Jack and Furley become convinced that he is one of London's most sought after criminals.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet is thrilled with her new job as an aerobics teacher, and her new boss Tina is thrilled with Jack. When Tina blackmails Jack into being at her beck and call, Larry offers to take her off Jack's hands.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an old flame at the park who is seeking advice about her jealous husband. Furley joins them, and they all get poison oak. Later, at Jack's house, Furley tells the husband they were all in the bushes together.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Furley get locked in a freezer together. Convinced they are going to die, they have a heart-to-heart talk, and Jack confesses that he really isn't gay. Once safe, Jack worries because Furley knows the truth about him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The trio plants a stray cat at Furley's door, hoping he'll bend his rules and keep it. When a girl appears looking for her kitten, Furley lies and says he took it to the pound; so Jack and the girls search the pounds and bring home three different cats.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: After a night on the town with his old navy buddies, Jack discovers he has a tattoo on his derriere. When Jack goes to the hospital to have it removed, Janet thinks he is having a vasectomy and Furley thinks he is having a sex change.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Spike and Carlee are stranded on Cybertron, desperate to find the Cybertronium needed to heal the ailing Autobots on Earth. Their only hope is to free the Dinobots, who are on Cybertron under the control of Shockwave's brainwashing program.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When Starscream inadvertently activates a time machine, he and his fellow Decepticons are sent back to medieval times. Luckily Spike, Hoist, and Warpath follow them back, and with help from Merlin, they are prepared to defend the kingdom from them.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Crash-landing on the moon Titan, the Decepticons trick the population into believing they are “Sky Gods” and that the people should serve them. Desperate to free her people, a brave girl sends an S.O.S. to the Autobots…but will they arrive in time?

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To stop the Decepticons from drilling into Earth’s core, the Autobots hijack and reprogram the mighty Devastator to use against them. But when they lose control of the giant, the only hope for survival is for the Autobots and Decepticons to work together!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Decepticons gain control over the Quantum Laboratories facility and begin to re-route oil tankers to be harvested for energy. The Autobots and Spike must attack on two fronts to keep Megatron from converting the power of the enormous oil tanker fleet.

programme.desc: A mad scientist creates a monster when he transplants the brain of an executed murderer into the body of an ape.

programme.title: Monster on the Campus
programme.desc: A professor turns into a Neanderthal killer after injecting himself with the blood of an ancient fish.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: An Egyptian mummy (Boris Karloff) searches Cairo for the girl (Zita Johann) he thinks is his long-lost princess.

programme.title: The Mummy's Curse
programme.desc: Shipped to Louisiana, mummy Kharis (Lon Chaney Jr.) and his princess (Virginia Christine) roam the bayou.

programme.title: The Mummy's Ghost
programme.desc: A 3000-year-old limping mummy (Lon Chaney) seeks his reincarnated princess (Ramsay Ames) in a Midwestern college town.

programme.title: The Mummy's Hand
programme.desc: Archaeologists (Dick Foran, Wallace Ford) defile the tomb of mummified Kharis, who was buried alive for falling in love with an Egyptian princess.

programme.title: The Mummy's Tomb
programme.desc: An old archaeologist (Dick Foran) recalls the mummy Kharis (Lon Chaney), now at large in New England.

programme.title: Night Creatures
programme.desc: Pirate Captain Clegg (Peter Cushing), an English vicar by day, leads ghostly mounted smugglers by night.

programme.title: Night Monster
programme.desc: A man (Lionel Atwill) uses mind over matter to replace his legs, then hunts the doctors who took them.

programme.title: The Night Walker
programme.desc: A lawyer (Robert Taylor) advises a blind man's rich widow (Barbara Stanwyck) tormented by nightmares.

programme.title: Run's House
programme.desc: When Russy decides he wants to be a magician, Rev is concerned he might be taking on one too many hobbies. With JoJo's help, the Great Russini is a BIG hit!

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: Stevie navigates life as a single man following a public breakup with Joseline. Joc and Scrappy plan a boys' night out. Stevie's daughters organize a garage sale to help their dad get rid of the past and start anew. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: Ray J is in town and Stevie and the boys are excited to show him a good time. Meanwhile, Stevie is surprised to find himself falling for an old friend. But she might not be as excited about starting a relationship as he is. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: Stevie challenges Yung Joc to a comedy contest and learns stand-up comedy is a lot harder than it looks. Stevie's daughters won't stop fighting, so Stevie enlists a secret weapon to bring them back together. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: Stevie competes with Yung Joc and Scrappy to see who will represent the new brand. Stevie tries to help Tommie move forward with a new career choice. Meanwhile, Faith Evans is having second thoughts about rejecting Stevie J. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Leave It To Stevie
programme.desc: When his daughter tells him his new beats are old news, Stevie decides to takes his music in a surprising direction. Stevie's old flame Mimi Faust needs a favor for their daughter Eva, but Stevie isn't sure he's up to the task. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: T.I. and Tiny are back and taking the kids into the wilderness for some good ole fashion family camping. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: T.I. is headlining this summer's hottest hip hop concert but can he tackle the pressure of the big stage after being away for so long? Also, Tameka has a surprise for T.I. he won't soon forget. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tameka's talk show was picked up and the ladies are getting ready for production. Shekinah is feeling out of the loop, but can she win Tameka over and get a spot on the show? Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: T.I. and Tiny's oldest daughter Niq Niq is turning 16 and T.I. wants to throw her the party of the year. But when it comes time for Niq Niq to get her dream car, Tip has other plans. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: T.I., Tiny, and Shekinah are Chicago bound. While T.I. promotes his upcoming album, Shekinah drags Tiny all through the windy city looking for her idol, Oprah. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After seeing T.I. on the set of a popular television series, Domani is convinced acting is easy. Wanting to teach his young son a lesson prompts T.I. to encourage his children to make their own movie. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After catching his family eating junk food, Tip decides it's time for them to get in shape! With money on the line, Tameka, Shekinah and the kids are put to the test. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tip notices the kids are missing out on certain skills he got from his old neighborhood. Trying to toughen them up, they hit the boxing gym where Major tries to take on his older brother. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After King's pet hamster passes away, the kids beg their dad for a dog. When Tameka makes an interesting offer on behalf of the children, Tip puts the kids through a test to see if they are responsible enough for a dog. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Finally fed up with being overweight and out of shape, Shekinah goes under the knife. Meanwhile, Tip wants to take the family to New Orleans to shoot a music video for his newest single with Lil' Wayne. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Trying to teach the kids business skills, Tip and Nelly help them come up with a plan. But when things start falling apart, one kid proves he's got Tip's knack for hustling and might just save the day. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: It's the battle of generations as Tameka and Niq Niq face off in a competition to see who's the better dancer. Meanwhile, Tip takes the kids to a skate park in an effort to teach Domani how to face his fears. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: As Major's first day of pre-school approaches, Auntie Precious feels like it's time to move on. Tameka isn't quite ready to let her leave the Harris home and devises a plan to keep her around. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After Shekinah acts unprofessional during the taping of Tameka's talk show pilot, Tameka worries Shekinah's attitude could jeopardize her hustle. Tameka insists she spend time with an etiquette coach but will it be enough? Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Domani is hired for his first paid gig but when he tells Tip he's intimidated by him, Tip has to decide whether or not to go to Domani's performance. Meanwhile, Tameka takes the kids horseback riding but Major is nervous. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: With Tip's probation coming to a close, it's time to go full hustle on promoting his new album with a big celebration bash. Tameka takes King to a meeting for his own pajama line, but the two have some creative differences. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: With Christmas around the corner, the kids are making their lists and checking them twice. But as the Christmas list grows, T.I.¹s concerned the kids don¹t know how much work goes into paying for their gifts. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: News circulates about Junior's involvement in Renee's father's arrest, Karen records a difficult chapter of her audiobook, and Drita prepares for her fight.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Karen prepares for her book release party, Ramona fights to get her confiscated jewelry back, Carla clears the air with Renee, and more news comes out about Junior.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Renee sees her father in court, Drita gets surprising news from Lee, Big Ang wants to give her husband another chance, and Karen takes on a new business venture.

programme.title: Mob Wives
programme.desc: Carla confronts Joe about his recent absence, Karen reunites with Dave, Renee opens up about Junior and her father on a radio show, and Drita gets surprising news from Lee.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Nicole Murphy, Andrea Kelly, Sheree Fletcher, Jessica Conseco, and Mayte Garcia are out to establish themselves as independent, successful women and bring relevance and honor to themselves separate from their very famous exes.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Despite warnings from her friends, Jessica seriously considers letting Jose move back in with her. Anxious to meet Mr. Right, Mayte resorts to a professional matchmaker, who urges her to de-Prince her home.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Just when Jessica thinks she might still be in love with Jose, she receives a bombshell from him. Meanwhile, Sheree and Terrell find themselves at odds over their long-distance marriage.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Anxious to escape the stress in their lives, the ladies head to Napa Valley for a weekend of fine food, fine wine, and (hopefully) fine men. On the trip, Jessica confronts Jose about his bad choices and gives him an ultimatum.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Nicole sets Mayte up on her first blind date, which stresses Mayte out. Meanwhile, Jessica breaks the news about Jose to Josie and then is shocked to learn that Josie is planning a visit to Planned Parenthood.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Tony sets Andrea up on a date with a local friend, but she worries how he will react when he finds out that R. Kelly is her ex. Meanwhile, Mayte plans a big party for her mother's birthday.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Controversy erupts during a weekend getaway to Palm Springs after Jessica accuses the others of being hypocrites. Not one to take it lightly, Sheree calls Jessica out.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Back in L.A., resentments are still simmering after the altercation in Palm Springs. Mayte, who receives bad news from a fertility expert, is especially sensitive and confronts Jessica during a ladies night out.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: The ladies take sides after the confrontation between Mayte and Jessica. Meanwhile, Andrea starts to feel pressure from Percy and worries that their relationship is moving too quickly.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Mayte and Jessica attempt to repair their damaged relationship. Meanwhile, Sheree pitches her skin product, Whoop-Ash, to a trendy Hollywood boutique and Nicole prepares a public showing of her new clothing line.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight, we learn if Leia Makoa can get a payback or will she take another beat down at the hands of Wrecking Ball. Will Lana Star's protege get the better of Stephy Slays? Or will Stephy's indomitable spirit win the day?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lana Star's privileged protege and member of the Fab 4, Penelope Pink must defeat the high flying Princess Aussie to secure a shot at the WOW Championship.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: WOW Superhero Kandi Krush wants revenge for her treasured boxing gloves, but is forced to make her way through a maze of freight, upheaval, and senaster mental torture to secure tonights long awaited revenge match against Chainsaw.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Robbie Rocket takes on Vivian Rivera while Gigi Gianni and Amber Rodriguez prepare to battle Jennifer Florez and Keta Rush in tag team action. Rapping sensation the quick lipped BK Rhythm battles crowd favorite Stephy Slay.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lana Star's Fabulous Four faction is taking over WOW but just what will that mean for the rest of the WOW roster? Can Tiki Chamorro defeat Exile's Genesis in a singles match as Exodus and Ice Cold stand ring side.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tonight's Main Event match is Coach Campanelli and Randi Rah Rah versus Miami's Sweet Heat in a rematch for the WOW Tag Team Championships! Will Sweet Heat retain?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Let's hope tonight's main event sticks to the rulebook as The Fabulous Four's Enforcer Vickie Lynn McCoy takes on the frog splashing Princess Aussie! We also see the in-person return of Angelica Dante, who we last saw in the attic of the House of Horrors.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The World's Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez, has a mysterious new tag team to introduce at WOW. Also in action today in what promises to be a hard-hitting, brawl of a match, Reina Del Rey and Wrecking Ball team up to take on The Heavy Metal Sisters.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Get ready for some rapping as BK Rhythm takes on The Bully Buster, Keta Rush. The Monsters of Madness, Holidead and Voodoo

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Islands will erupt tonight when Leia Makoa and Tiki Chamorro join forces with the Tonga Twins to battle the faction of World Champion Penelope Pink

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The action kicks off with Gigi Gianni vs. the high flying Jennifer Florez. Then, after interference in their singles match, Kandi Krush is teamed with her friend Princess Aussie in tag team action as they look to even the score with Team Exile

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Vickie Lynn McCoy put's the WOW roster on notice that they will have to go through her to get to her Fabulous Four sister, the WOW World Champion Penelope Pink. Can Foxxy Fierce overcome The Enforcer?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tag Team action with GiGi Gianni and Amber Rodriguez taking on Jennifer Florez and Stephy Slays kicks off an hour of WOW. Plus, Kandi Krush has issued a challenge to Team Exile and the frigid Ice Cold.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In tonight's opening battle it's pure tag team bedlam as the World's Greatest Attorney Sophia Lopez's team of Las Bandidas: Sylvia Sanchez and Vivian Rivera take on The Tonga Twins! BK Rhythm has rapped herself into a winning streak.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A grieving father who is the town drunk hires Josh Randall with his last $30 to find his murdered son's body, but Josh's search for clues runs up against a cowardly conspiracy of silence.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: At the request of his friend's wife, Randall comes to assist and protect a war buddy in his bid for the town's mayoralty, quickly running afoul of the established political machine and its corrupt mayor and wanted sheriff.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A bounty hunter is not a hero in his own hometown, as Josh learns when he honors a dying friend's request to return his body to Cameron and the townspeople rush to judgment, believing Josh killed him for the reward money.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is approached by the wife of a wanted man eager to turn himself in peacefully, provided Josh splits the bounty with his wife.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A man with unwavering faith in a legend about lost treasure hires Josh to lead his family on an expedition into the desert to locate the cache of Spanish gold.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When a young runaway is framed for killing a Pinkerton agent, Randall turns detective to uncover the real killer.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is requested to meet a famous singer at the opera house in Denver who has a job for him.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh comes to the aid of his old friend Jesse, who is being strong-armed into selling the Outrider Hotel and Saloon owned by his beautiful girlfriend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A decidedly different and dangerous assignment awaits Josh when he agrees to go into the Apache camp and compete in their contests to win the hand of a woman.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Pursuing killer Joe Collins into the Superstition Mountains, Josh is followed by a man who believes Collins could be his long-lost son.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A blindly obedient religious cult cast lots and it falls upon a young woman to act as its angel of vengeance.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh receives a letter from a girl at the St.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A concerned father hires Josh to retrieve his son, a passionate young ideologue whose gift for rousing rhetoric is being used by plunderers to recruit freedom fighters.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh's big talk after a dog is shot lands him in big trouble when his browbeating the locals in the saloon about ending the decades-long Carter-Blake feud.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: To track down the cheating tinhorn gambler Johnny Deuce and recover his money, Randall befriends the card sharp's protégé, a 12-year-old orphan boy and card cheat, nicknamed The Montana Kid.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh embarks on a mission of mercy when he pleads with the parents of a boy with appendicitis to let the doctor operate.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh reluctantly accepts an offbeat assignment: finding a beautiful bride for his bashful buddy Charlie, the homeliest and loneliest man in the West.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The government employs Randall to portray an escaped prisoner in order to trick his cellmate into leading authorities to the $50,000 he stole and stashed away in a secret location.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall finds his prey in the hands of a lynch mob wiping out his bounty.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Who needs enemies with friends like the residents of Rogue City, who celebrate Randall for bringing in notorious killer Jumbo Kane.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is rooked out of his bounty by crafty criminal Hunt Willis and his accomplice.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Against better judgment after losing a quick draw contest and bet, Josh serves as a guide for a dandified East Coast gun salesman who comes west to retrieve and replace a defective gun he sold to notorious outlaw Curly Bill Brocius.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: On the trail of a Cavalry deserter and the horses he stole, Josh rides into a town ruled as the private fiefdom of its autocratic, psychopathic marshal who is holding the horses and deserter.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Hired by a father to bring back the man who killed his son Josh is surprised when he doesn't get paid because he brought the man back alive.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh must bring a man back for murder.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings a wanted man into the Mesa City Sheriff, only to find he killed the sheriff's brother.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is looking for a man who, while trying to rob a bank, is bitten by a rabid dog.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's friends are unconscious, leaving him to defeat Alexander the Great on his own!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Grandpa found the Millennium Puzzle decades ago, but little is known about the terrors, traps, turmoil, and treachery he faced to find the ancient artifact! See how it all began as we learn how Grandpa unearthed the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The evil spirit within the Millennium Ring has reunited with Bakura, prepped with a new monster to create the ultimate Shadow Game. And his first target is Kaiba!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends go to the dawn of the duel, to the place where it all began, to the land where the Pharaoh's mysteries lie: Egypt.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The past is quickly becoming perilous as the fearless bandit king Bakura has invaded the Pharaoh's palace to take down the keepers of the seven Millennium Items single-handedly!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Even with the potent power of Obelisk the Tormentor, the Pharaoh couldn't prevent the bandit Bakura from escaping. Everyone knows that thief will return for a rematch, so Seto has a plan to create a powerful army.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad vows to stop the bandit king Bakura's sneak attacks once and for all, but he may have made a promise he can't keep!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad, the first of the Pharaoh's guardians, has fallen. Even worse, the bandit king Bakura now has the Millennium Ring, making his Diabound even more unstoppable!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origins of the Millennium Items are revealed! Who forged these powerful artifacts, and why were they created? Though the Millennium Items are powerful, such power comes with a heavy price... a debt that may never be able to be repaid!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh calls forth the mighty Egyptian God Slifer the Sky Dragon to fight the bandit Bakura's Diabound, but when Diabound starts attacking the townspeople, the Pharaoh must protect them, even if it means sacrificing himself!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The bandit Bakura has stolen the Millennium Puzzle and sent the Pharaoh plummeting into the abyss. Now he's another step closer to obtaining all seven Millennium Items and resurrecting the malevolent Zorc, the greatest evil of all time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the Pharaoh are reunited, but the Pharaoh is powerless without the Millennium Puzzle! However, that won't stop the Pharaoh from a final showdown against the bandit king Bakura.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the showdown in the sands between the bandit Bakura and his ever-growing Diabound versus the Pharaoh, Mahad the Dark Magician, and the remaining guardians of the Pharaoh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With the help of his father's spirit, the Pharaoh and his guardians defeated the bandit Bakura's Diabound and stopped the horrible Zorc from resurrecting... or did they?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh's journey was more than a trip to the past, it's the greatest Shadow Game ever created. Yami Yugi and Yami Bakura's Shadow Game has already reached apocalyptic proportions, but it's only the beginning of cataclysmic events!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Zorc's incredible shadow energies have resurrected the bandit Bakura and his Diabound. With a second chance at revenge, the bandit king has broken up the Pharaoh's team so that he can divide and conquer them one at a time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The hope of mankind rests on Yugi's shoulders as he arrives at the final temple chamber where the Pharaoh's name is located, but something unexpected is waiting for them - a sinister surprise that can cost them their lives!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After a nearly eternal slumber, the all-powerful Zorc has resurrected, plunging the world into darkness!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and his guardians are down to their last line of defense as Shada falls victim to Zorc. The Pharaoh desperately wants to summon the three Egyptian Gods, but he can't without his Millennium Puzzle!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Exodia the Forbidden One couldn't defeat Zorc! Exodia was able to buy enough time for the Pharaoh to get his Millennium Puzzle back-he can now summon the almighty Egyptian Gods! It's time for the Pharaoh's counterattack in the biggest brawl.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian Gods have been defeated. The Pharaoh is severely hurt and unable to stop Zorc from setting fire to the city, but our heroes aren't giving up. It's not double vision when Seto and Kaiba transcend time to confront Zorc.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and Kaiba's combined strength couldn't defeat Zorc. Yugi must give the Pharaoh his name, but Yugi doesn't know how to read ancient Egyptian text. All bets are off in the final clash where Yugi must protect the past to save the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pharaoh Atem, Yugi, and friends have defeated the bandit Bakura and Zorc, but the final test still awaits! Yugi must duel Atem! As they set sail to the final dueling grounds, everyone realizes this may be the final night Yugi and Atem have together.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi defeats Atem, Yugi will prove he's ready to stand on his own, and Atem can join his friends in the world beyond. But Yugi and Atem will be separated forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem has summoned all three Egyptian Gods! What chance does Yugi have against these powerful creatures that no one has been able to defeat? Yugi better think of a strategy quickly or this duel will be over soon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem still has all three Egyptian God Cards, Yugi doesn't have a single monster on the field! Yugi claims that he has a combo that will defeat the Egyptian Gods, but is he simply bragging, or does he actually have a plan?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Atem - more than friends, closer than brothers. Will they stay together, or is it time to say goodbye? It's the final answer, the final duel, and the final time we will see our friends in the rousing conclusion to Yu-Gi-Oh!
